creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I decided not to commit your patch, because 

- I don't want to explicitly state dependencies where indirect are just fine 
- I don't wat bogus plist replacements just for a sake of squelching portlint warning 
- No point trying to remove share/locale/rw, it's guaranteed to contain files from dependencies
